photoUpload.sectionHint: Cover photo and up to 10 gallery photos. JPG or PNG, max 5 MB each.
photoUpload.coverEmpty: No cover photo set. Click "Set as cover" on any gallery photo.
photoUpload.errorTooLarge: File is too large. Max 5 MB.
photoUpload.errorWrongType: Only JPG and PNG photos are allowed.
photoUpload.errorLimit: You already have the maximum of 10 photos.

menuUpload.sectionHint: Upload a single PDF menu. Max 10 MB.
menuUpload.errorTooLarge: File is too large. Max 10 MB.

disabledDates.sectionHint: Block specific dates from receiving reservations — private events, holidays, kitchen closures, etc.
disabledDates.errorAlreadyExists: This date is already on the disabled list.
disabledDates.errorPast: Date must be today or in the future.

sectionOps.shrinkError: Can't shrink — {count} table(s) would fall outside the new grid: {samples}.
sectionOps.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the section and all of its tables. Past reservations will be kept but unlinked from these tables.
sectionOps.deleteBlocked: This section has {count} future reservation(s). Cancel or reassign them before deleting.
